title: ClinVar region (duckhts over HTTP) — the agent discovers the schema and composes the summary
description: A ClinVar VCF region read DIRECTLY over HTTPS by duckhts (htslib tabix RANGE read — it fetches only the region's blocks, not the whole file), materialized as the `clinvar` table. The resource region selects the TP53 index blocks efficiently; the agent still states the exact coordinate predicate in answer SQL, performs schema discovery (INFO_CLNSIG, INFO_MC, INFO_GENEINFO, ...), and composes the summary. duckhts's remote read is htslib, not the injected fetch, so it needs no network resolver — only host egress.

resolvers.title: DuckHTS read_bcf
resolvers.description: Read an HTS file (VCF/BCF) region into a tidy table via htslib.
